what_was_done: Fixed code indexer: boot trigger now re-checks socket availability (retries=3, 0.5s), wrap-up SKILL.md now calls reindex_code('wrapup') via UDS instead of broken search_knowledge call. Added per-snapshot status files (.code_index_boot_status, .code_index_wrapup_status) and statusline indicators — yellow while indexing, green when done (boot on line 1, wrapup on line 2). Removed dead dashboard/ and tui/ dirs (11k lines). 1449 tests pass.
next_steps: Verify config.json toggles survive task reset
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
ChromaDB concurrent access - tests skip when MCP running, correct behavior
test_framework.py Pyright import errors for shared modules (path resolution)
Flaky test: Lever4 TriggerC (capture queue state-dependent, passes on re-run)
